body_excerpt: {"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "Mr-In4inci3le", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/78592816?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Mr-In4inci3le", "id": 78592816, "login": "Mr-In4inci3le", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc4NTkyODE2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mr-In4inci3le", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45669", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-83"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-83", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Script in Attributes in a Web Page"}], "description": "### Summary `navigateTo()` with `external: true` generates a server-side HTML redirect body containing a `` tag. The destination URL is only sanitized by replacing `"` with `%22`, leaving `<`, `>`, `&`, and `'` unencoded. An attacker who can influence the URL passed to `navigateTo(url, { external: true })` can break out of the `content="…"` attribute and inject arbitrary HTML/JavaScript that executes under the application's origin. This is a different root cause from CVE-2024-34343 (GHSA-vf6r-87q4-2vjf), which addressed `javascript:` protocol bypass. The issue here is triggered by any valid URL containing `>`. ### Impact Applications that pass user-controlled input to `navigateTo(url, { external: true })` — typically via a `?next=` / `?redirect=` query parameter used for post-login or "return to" flows — are vulnerable to reflected cross-site scripting. The injected script runs in the context of the application's origin during the server-rendered redirect response, before the meta-refresh fires. ### Details In `packages/nuxt/src/app/composables/router.ts`, the SSR redirect path builds an HTML response body with only `"` percent-encoded in the destination URL: ```ts const encodedLoc = location.replace(/"/g, '%22') nuxtApp.ssrContext!['~renderResponse'] = { status: sanitizeStatusCode(options?.redirectCode || 302, 302), body: ``, headers: { location: encodeURL(location, isExternalHost) }, } ``` The `Location` header is normalised through `encodeURL()` (which uses the `URL` constructor and correctly percent-encodes attribute-significant characters). The HTML body uses a narrower sanitiser. That mismatch is the root cause. ### Proof of concept Global middleware that forwards a query parameter to `navigateTo`: ```ts // middleware/redirect.global.ts export default defineNuxtRouteMiddleware((to) => { const next = to.query.next as string | undefined if (next) { return navigateTo(next, { external: true }) } }) ``` Request: ``` GET /?next=https://evil.example/x> ``` Response body: ```html ``` The `>` after `evil.example/x` terminates the `content="…"` attribute, and the `` tag executes JavaScript in the application's origin before any redirect occurs. ### Patches Fixed in `nuxt@4.4.6` and `nuxt@3.21.6` by [#35052](https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/pull/35052). The fix percent-encodes the full set of HTML-attribute-significant characters (`&`, `"`, `'`, `<`, `>`) before interpolating the URL into the meta-refresh body ### Workarounds If you can't upgrade immediately, validate user-controlled URLs before passing them to `navigateTo(url, { external: true })`. At minimum, normalise through `new URL(input).toString()` and reject inputs containing `<` or `>` (a normalised URL with these characters is malformed and safe to refuse). ", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fx6j-w5w5-h468", "html_url": "https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/security/advisories/GHSA-fx6j-w5w5-h468", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fx6j-w5w5-h468"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45669"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-18T11:07:53Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/28706372?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/danielroe", "id": 28706372, "login": "danielroe", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI4NzA2Mzcy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/danielroe", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Reflected XSS in `navigateTo` external redirect", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T11:07:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nuxt/nuxt/security-advisories/GHSA-fx6j-w5w5-h468", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nuxt"}, "patched_versions": "> 3.21.5, < 4.0.0-alpha.1", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.4.3, <= 3.21.5"}, {"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nuxt"}, "patched_versions": "> 4.4.5", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-alpha.1, <= 4.4.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Reflected XSS in `navigateTo` external redirect
